Hi, new and trying to figure out who to get in By The Silver Key. I have a Thais that I want to keep using, (and a Daffodil  that I could use or not if that matters), kind of need a damage dealer. 
Is kath worth getting or is she just too bad before e3 to use?
i wouldn’t recommend using kath before e3 just based on what other people have said
i’ll always recommend castor, he’s a super solid shielder at e0

Kath is worth getting if you are planning to bring her to e3. You can do that with the monthly dupes, but it will take time. Unfortunately most of the dps options people generally recommend in the silver key event (pollux/kath) want e3. Thats kind of common for dps options in the endgame.

If you are looking for a good dps that works with thais, the current collab unit mouchette is very good. She also eventually wants e2/e3 in the endgame, but she is way more playable than kath before she has e3.
that is correct, kath before e3 feels pretty awful
What do the dreamspark/dreamshards do
level up talents for awakeners
for soul forge level
They upgrade the soulforge talent levels of your characters. This will buff them in arc 2 story and dtide.
Thank you 👍
That makes sense - looking at that team, Helot seems like it'd be good - I have 2 protoparadise, would it be a big mistake to use one to get Helot?

That sounds reasonable to me. Helot is very good as a strike support on that team. You could also try fishing in caro standard a little if you have the standard pulls and don't have many caro characters yet+are trying to fill out your roster. Faint would also be an nice pickup. Faint and helot both very good at e0.
You will get more protos next major patch when they let you reset unwanted units, so its not like the most super limited resource ever.
reset as in turn my e3 celeste into an e0?
(they told me the blue banner was good! I got 6 awakeners from it and 4 of them are celeste. free me from this celeste hell)

Yeah, if thats a unit you don't want. Or you could send her to the black pool for 4 protos and she would be gone from your account unit you pull her again. Thats pretty much what happened to me last patch and caecus.

generally, as long as you spend all your energy in event stage

Lily wants e3? And for her wod does it have to be maxed for her to get good value or could I rip one copy and start running her
its roughly the same, but if you build crit you can use it on other characters also

lily wants e3 and high levels

her wod is one of the good ones to max, it costs a lot of pulls though so its reasonable to run it at e0 and use timeloops to slowly max it

she also doesn't need her own wheel specifically, she can equip any other defensive wheel like sanga wheel or dusk & dawn. Lily wheel is much better on a strike dps like mouchette

find a whale on the leaderboards and copy their UID

Go into supports and paste their UID into favorites. Follow and favorite, now you can use their support character

annihilate level 60 stage with their maxed out dps

How do you play Kathi

use exalt and kath posse to get cards with fiamma

play cards that have fiamma to get combust

when you get 10 combust solarflare turns into hyperflare, use it for boom

repeat
I wanna build a mouchette team, who's best paired with her? Or is her team building super flexible
example comp
she has a few comps but this is the easiest one if you are new
shes strong enough that u can run her suboptimal and still do fine

Thais - Helot - Aigis is her best team in terms of single burst ceiling 
Lily - Casiah - Horla has a lower ceiling, but an easier setup and more sustain 
Alternatively, some monochaos team with Hameln - Lily - GRamona/Ryker totally works too
Ty

1. Brown Wheels (R) are broken in Arc 1 ruleset, consider using them on your supports. The most used ones are Gluttony/Emerge/Frenzy, however there are quite a bunch of useful ones like Vitality, Aged, Whisper etc, you can look at those yourself.
2. Poison teams require specific setup and a lot of investment to work and even then they are used mostly against boss only stages. I would consider using another DPS.

Yeah it depends on the event, some give less, some give a ton of those.
There are events which can give 24 purple edifying stuff per 120 stamina and that's without considering the ones that are usually in shop. Just wait for another event, I doubt you need them that much to switch to Interlude since it's not really the best stamina usage.

For an easy speedrun, Mouchette would likely be your most viable option. She's typically run with Caro / Chaos mixed Realms using Awakeners such as Thais, Helot + your pick of Aigis, Faint, Ramona, Lily, Hameln and Ryker. Unfortunately, Thais's Banner had ended just a few days prior to when you had first started the game. But you should still be able to safely clear all of Arc 1 NM and up to Chapter 7 of HM using Mouchette, Ramona, Helot and Aigis

Brown WoDs (for Arc 1 only) 
BiS 

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Contenders 

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle

Epiphany - Grants 1000 Keyflare at the beginning of a Stage, grants 2 Arithmatecia for the first turn of a Boss Battle

Situational

Hope - Recover 5% of loss Health upon discovering a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, receive 100% Crit Damage + Chance

Vitality - Receive the additional Option to remove up to 3 Symptoms / States in Junctions

Because it grants you an 0-Cost Card called Irregular Form which lets you pick between any of Helot's Cards (generates w/o Orisons), and it has Exhaust + Retain
So the Card will both stay permanently in your Hand until played and will then be removed permanently from your Deck until the end of the Battle
Which can get very annoying at times
Where you'll want the Hand Space it takes up for something else like holding your Embryos or retaining Mouchette's Mortal Blast for Burst Turns
